case_title: TIM BURKE VS. LIANG B ZHAO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF TIM BURKE AND DEFENDANT LIANG B. ZHAO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKE, TIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHAO, LIANG B $2,320.23 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,435.23, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,320.23, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. COSTS ARE NOT AWARDED AS DEFENDANT MADE AN OFFER AND TENDERED PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,320.23 WHICH PLAINTIFF REJECTED PRIOR TO FILING A CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED JUL-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHAO, LIANG B
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BURKE, TIM AS TO DEFENDANT ZHAO, LIANG B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
